name: DaVinci Miqro-C 10mm Adapter Silicone
summary: DaVinci Miqro-C 10mm Adapter Silicone — a accessory for keeping your kit running.
description: The DaVinci MIQRO-C 10mm Silicone Adapter is an official accessory designed to enhance compatibility between the DaVinci MIQRO-C Vaporiser and standard 10mm glass water tools. Manufactured from food-grade silicone, the adapter delivers a secure and flexible connection while remaining lightweight and durable for repeated use. Water tool compatibility helps cool vapour output and smooth inhalation without significantly affecting flavour, making this a popular functional upgrade for desktop and home users. This silicone adapter provides a simple, low-maintenance solution that appeals to both new and experienced MIQRO-C users. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.

specs.label: Compatibility
specs.value: DaVinci MIQRO-C Vaporiser Glass fit: 10mm water tools only
